alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; experience navigating complex, multi-stakeholder process design and organizational change.
alignments.job_requirement: Maintain and continuously improve the QMS to meet EN 9100 (incl. ISO 9001) and AQAP standards, working with process owners across the organisation

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led requirements definition, design, UAT, and transformation rollout on multiple global programs; managed cross-functional stakeholder alignment and gate-based program execution.
alignments.job_requirement: Act as responsible Quality Assurance Engineer on programmes—engaging during contract requirements development, coordinating and signing off quality plans, and overseeing quality-compliant execution

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaling operations and transformation roles included partnering with engineering teams on product and operational logic; basic Python knowledge and active learning in technical domains.
alignments.job_requirement: Work alongside engineering teams to ensure software quality requirements are correctly interpreted and embedded in development processes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German, professional/fluent English; eight years leading global cross-functional programs and external stakeholder engagement.
alignments.job_requirement: Communicate with precision and confidence in both English and German; engage with multicultural teams and formal defence customer and regulatory interfaces

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaled global operations and transformation programs; demonstrated ability to balance multiple workstreams and drive execution under ambiguity.
alignments.job_requirement: Manage competing priorities across QMS and programme workstreams; navigate ambiguity without losing focus

gaps.gap: No aerospace, defence, or highly regulated industry quality assurance background; all experience in commercial consumer tech
gaps.mitigation: Domain knowledge (EN 9100, AQAP standards, defence contracting, quality audits) can be acquired through structured onboarding and mentorship, though ramp time will be significant. Candidate's transformation and process-scaling background provides operational foundation.

gaps.gap: No hands-on experience conducting formal quality audits, managing quality plans, or maintaining a Quality Management System in a regulated context
gaps.mitigation: These are core technical competencies in the role. While the candidate has managed large-scale programs and process design, formal QMS and audit experience is distinct and typically requires direct training or prior exposure.

gaps.gap: Limited software development assurance expertise; no track record embedding quality requirements into software development lifecycles in regulated environments
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has partnered with engineering teams and understands requirements and UAT, but lacks the deep SDLC-quality integration knowledge that the role requires day-to-day. This is a learnable but substantive gap.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated experience with defence or government customer quality interfaces, contractual quality requirements translation, or regulatory compliance in defence procurement
gaps.mitigation: Stakeholder management and contract requirements navigation skills are transferable, but defence-specific protocols, customer expectations, and regulatory nuance require direct learning.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 5+ years regulated industry QA (aligns L4 anchor), hands-on QMS/audit responsibility, and programme leadership across QMS and development assurance. Title and scope suggest mid-IC or senior-IC operator reporting to quality leadership; company stage unstated. L4 (Senior IC / Lead) is appropriate for the posted scope.
output.summary: This Quality Assurance Engineer role is a specialized, regulated-industry position in defence aerospace—outside the candidate's target strategy and operations family. While the candidate brings strong programme management, stakeholder alignment, and cross-functional execution skills, the role's core responsibilities (QMS maintenance, EN 9100/AQAP compliance, formal audit conduct, software development assurance integration) require domain expertise and hands-on regulated-quality experience that the candidate lacks. The candidate's eight years are in commercial consumer tech scaling and transformation, not aerospace or defence QA. Domain and role-family fit are weak despite strong operational instincts.
uncertainties: Company size/stage not stated; Helsing context (funding, team scale, maturity) would clarify whether ramp time for domain onboarding is realistic.
Candidate's 'basic Python and actively learning' level and extent of software development lifecycle exposure unclear; software development assurance day-to-day depth unknown.
No information on whether candidate has prior interest in or exposure to defence, aerospace, or regulated-industry work; mission fit and retention risk unknown.
